title: Mp3 Player
description: Adds A Mp3 Player That Plays Music
body:
Adds A Mp3 Player That Plays Music 

 

Just Right Click With The Mp3 Player In Hand, Then Choose One Of Our Select Music Disc Classics And BAM MUSIC

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Music Currently Only Plays In A Radius Around Where You Originally Clicked Play And Does Not Follow You Around.
